title: Gujarat GCAS UG Registration 2026

detail.title: Gujarat GCAS UG Registration 2026
detail.short_info: Gujarat GCAS UG Registration 2026 starts on May 7, 2026. Apply online for BA, BSc, BCom, BBA, BCA, and other UG courses through the GCAS portal. Check important dates, eligibility criteria, application fee, merit list and admission schedule here.

content.text: The Gujarat Common Admission Services (GCAS) has started the centralized online registration for Undergraduate (UG) admissions in Government, Grant-in-Aid, and Self-Finance colleges affiliated with participating universities for the academic year 2026-27. Registration will begin on May 7, 2026 (11:00 AM). This is a complete merit-based centralized admission process for various UG courses including BA, B.Sc, B.Com, BBA, BCA and many more. This guide covers important dates, eligibility, application fee, step-by-step process, and direct links.

sections.heading: Overview of Gujarat GCAS UG Admission 2026

content.text: Apply Online / Registration: GCAS Official Portal
Admission Schedule PDF: Download Official Schedule

items: Must have passed Class 12 (10+2) or equivalent examination from a recognized board.
Minimum marks requirement varies as per university and course (generally 45% – 50% for most courses).
For reserved category students, relaxation in minimum marks is applicable as per Gujarat Government norms.
Candidates appearing in Class 12 exams in 2026 can also apply (provisional admission).

content.text: Application / Registration fee will be charged as per the official notification. Payment can be made online through net banking, UPI, credit/debit card, or other available modes on the GCAS portal.

sections.heading: How to Apply for Gujarat GCAS UG Admission 2026

items: Visit the official GCAS portal — gcas.gujgov.edu.in
Click on UG Admission 2026-27 and complete Quick Registration.
Fill the online application form with personal, academic and contact details.
Upload required documents (Photo, Signature, Marksheets, etc.).
Fill course and college preferences carefully.
Pay the registration fee online.
Submit the form and take a printout of the confirmation page.

sections.heading: Documents Required for GCAS UG Admission

items: Class 10th and 12th Marksheet & Certificate
Recent Passport Size Photograph
Scanned Signature
School Leaving Certificate
Caste/Category Certificate (if applicable)
EWS Certificate (if applicable)
Domicile Certificate (if required)
Income Certificate (for scholarship)

sections.heading: Gujarat GCAS UG Admission 2026: Courses Offered

content.text: BA, B.Sc, B.Com, BBA, BCA, BSW, BRS, BSc (IT), BSc (Microbiology), B.Ed, and many other undergraduate programmes across Arts, Science, Commerce, and Vocational streams.
